home.title: BS Kara Remote
home.subtitle: Enter the room code shown on the TV
home.qrTip: Or scan the QR code on the TV
home.noActiveRoom: No active party. Turn on the TV to start a room first.

tv.heading: BS Kara
tv.startPrompt: Click anywhere or press any key to start the party…
tv.addSongsHint: Add songs from your phone using room code below
tv.roomCodeHint: Enter on your phone to join

endPartyConfirm.title: End the party?
endPartyConfirm.message: The queue, current song, and history will be cleared. Connected phones stay in the room and can start a new round.

tv.endPartyNotice: Party ended. Queue cleared — add a new song to start again.

search.voiceNotSupported: Voice search is not supported in this browser.
search.noResults: No songs found. Please try a different keyword!
search.errorQuota: Search service is busy. Please try again in a moment.

queue.title: Queue
queue.emptyMessage: Your queue is empty. Add a song to get started!

removeConfirm.title: Skip this song?
removeConfirm.message: The current song will be skipped and the next one will play.

player.idleHint: Nothing playing yet — pick a song from Search and tap add.
player.idleFullscreenHint: Waiting for next song — pick one to play

autoRandom.description: When the queue is empty, a new song is picked automatically using the filters below.
autoRandom.filtersHint: When the queue is empty, pick a new song using these filters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeHint: Pick a light, dark, or system-matching theme.
settings.dragDropHint: Let users drag songs to change the queue order.
settings.requesterPromptHint: When off, songs go straight into the queue without asking who's singing.
settings.aiMcHint: Before each song, an AI MC reads a short Vietnamese intro through the TV speakers.

requester.title: Who's singing this?
requester.hint: Add a singer name so it shows up when the song plays.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

loadFailed.title: Couldn't load this page
loadFailed.message: Something went wrong. Please check your connection and try again.

roomNotFound.title: Room not found
roomNotFound.message: This room code is invalid or the party has ended. Please check the code shown on the TV.
